title: Federal Funding — Arts & Humanities Agencies
content:
Arts and humanities federal sponsors listed by Morgan State ORA on the Funding Sources page:

- Institute for Museum and Library Services (IMLS) — https://www.imls.gov/
- National Endowment for the Arts (NEA) — https://www.arts.gov/
- National Endowment for the Humanities (NEH) — http://www.neh.gov/

Morgan humanities, arts, library science, and museum studies faculty should also consult NEH's HBCU-targeted programs — the Humanities Initiatives at HSIs/HBCUs/TCUs and the Awards for Faculty at HSIs/HBCUs/TCUs (see opportunity_category_hbcu_msi).
